things.name: Kyiv Pechersk Lavra (Monastery of the Caves)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage monastery complex with an underground labyrinth of cave monks' tombs

things.name: St Sophia Cathedral
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 11th-century Byzantine cathedral with original mosaics and frescoes

things.name: St Michael's Golden-Domed Monastery
things.description: Brilliant blue and gold 12th-century monastery overlooking the Dnieper river

things.name: Maidan Nezalezhnosti (Independence Square)
things.description: Ukraine's central square, site of the 2004 Orange Revolution and 2014 Euromaidan uprising

things.name: Golden Gate (Zoloti Vorota)
things.description: Reconstructed 11th-century fortified gate of ancient Kyiv with a museum inside

things.name: Motherland Monument
things.description: 62m stainless steel Soviet-era statue of the Motherland holding a sword and shield

things.name: Andriyivsky Uzviz (Andrew's Descent)
things.description: Cobblestoned artists' street lined with galleries, antique shops and cafes

things.name: National Museum of the History of Ukraine
things.description: 400,000 artefacts spanning Scythian gold, Cossack culture and modern Ukraine

things.name: Podil Neighbourhood
things.description: Historic merchant district with colourful architecture, street art and the Kontraktova Square

things.name: Chernobyl Day Trip
things.description: Guided tour to the Chernobyl Exclusion Zone - the 1986 nuclear disaster site
